title: Safety Specialist (Civil Engineering exp!) #HHL
description:
Responsibilities

  • Monitor and analyze Safety, Health & Environment (SHE) activities by compiling statistics and preparing monthly reports to inform management decisions
  • Conduct comprehensive Safety Induction sessions for all new employees to ensure workplace safety awareness from day one
  • Ensure compliance with Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations by managing ISO 45001 and BizSAFE audit processes to maintain certification standards
  • Lead SHE awareness campaigns and coordinate efforts to achieve and support safety certifications and awards that enhance organizational safety culture
  • Perform regular site inspections to identify hazards and recommend corrective and preventive actions that mitigate risks and improve safety performance
  • Collaborate with project teams on SHE matters and liaise effectively with clients and regulatory authorities to ensure compliance and resolve safety issues
  • Produce and distribute monthly Safety Bulletins and manage the allocation of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) to maintain workforce safety readiness
  • Serve as the SGSecure representative and promote company-wide security awareness initiatives to strengthen organizational resilience
  • Provide first aid and emergency support as required to respond promptly to workplace incidents and safeguard employee wellbeing
  • Support projects by fulfilling the roles of Workplace Safety and Health Officer (WSHO) and Environmental Control Officer (ECO) as needed to uphold safety standards
  • Develop and prepare SHE plans, procedures, and documentation to support project tendering and bidding processes with compliance assurance
  • Identify training needs and coordinate safety training programs to close competency gaps and enhance employee safety skills
  • Manage safety personnel and external vendors/subcontractors to ensure adherence to legal safety requirements and contractual obligations
  • Support the implementation and continuous improvement of the SHE Management System across the company to embed safety best practices

Required competencies and certifications

  • Minimum Diploma or Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field
  • Minimum 2 years of safety experience in construction or project environments
  • Ability to work comfortably on-site and manage audits and compliance activities

If interested, please email me at alexgoh@recruitexpress.com.sg or telegram @alexgohhl

➖

Alex Goh Hock Leong

(CEI.No: R1763413 l Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Life Science) | 99C4599).

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
